Package result

Class LoginResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • result.Result
      • result.LoginResult
  • public class LoginResult
extends Result
    Response body for the Login API call

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) AuthToken authToken
      Non-empty auth token
      (package private) String personID
      Non-empty string containing the Person Id of the user's generated Person object
      (package private) String userName
      Unique user name (non-empty string)

      • Fields inherited from class result.Result

        message

    • Constructor Detail

      • LoginResult

        public LoginResult()

      • LoginResult

        public LoginResult​(AuthToken authToken,
                   String userName,
                   String personID)
        Proper constructor to generate a response message for the login api call
        Parameters:
        authToken - authToken of this user's current session
        userName - username of the user
        personID - Person ID of the user's Person object
